name: forgejo
description: Work with the Elephant Hand Forgejo instance through goern/forgejo-mcp, fj, and the Forgejo API.

interface.shortDescription: Use Elephant Hand Forgejo from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds a pinned upstream goern/forgejo-mcp server for repository, issue, pull-request, Actions workflow, organization, user, and release workflows, plus fj CLI guidance and a small REST fallback helper for direct API inspection.
defaultPrompt: Show open pull requests in this Forgejo repo.
Create a Forgejo issue for this bug.
